text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, when we're off from training...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer! Could you ask for a better day to go hiking? There ain't a cloud in the sky!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Same here! ♪ I modeled the route after the hikes
I used to go on with my folks! It's gonna be like
hikin' down memory lane!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We're gonna "ooh" and "ah" like you won't believe! Now, let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Can you believe we're already halfway up?!
The mountains in Japan are so cute and tiny
compared to back home. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You okay, Trainer?! You're breathin' awful hard!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You sure? You look ready to keel over any
sec—whoopsie daisy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snatch!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I got ya in the nick of time! Imagine if you
went tumblin' down the mountain.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Looks like the shoe's on the other foot
today! Glad I got the chance to help you for a
change!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I want you to lean on me even more! How's about
I help you all the way to the top?! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Lunch time! And the staple of every hiking lunch...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's right! A club sandwich bigger than your
face! Let's see who can finish first!
choice_data_list: Are you sure that's a staple?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Does a bear squat in the woods? It's what my
family always packs! Just one sandwich'll take
care of ya for the day!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Fresh tomato! Cheese! Meat! And a big jug of
milk to wash it all down!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What more could ya ask for?! ♪ Here! Take a nice
big chomp!
choice_data_list: It's so big. Where do I even start?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Need me to feed it to you? Back when I was little,
my mom would help me too. ♪
choice_data_list: I... I can do it myself!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho! Is that a blush I see? Ain't nothin' to be
shy about!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Awww... But don't you look cute! You got my
heart all aflutter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She continues teasing me throughout the meal,
and then leads me to...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Last but not least, we fly through the air in a
hot-air balloon!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Look at 'em all, driftin' up there! Really, just look!
All those balloons, aaall the waaay up the—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Say! Is it really okay for 'em to be up that high?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That reminds me! Papa used to always pick
me up and carry me on board...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But now I'm a full-grown lady! I can get on all by
myself!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But... if you're scared, we can always do somethin' else.
choice_data_list: Yeah, let's not. It looks scary.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh... I mean, yeah! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa! We're so high up! ...Too high! Too high!
Aaagh! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Squeeze!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! Oh no! Nonononooo! Trainer, hold
onto meee!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Finally, back on solid ground! I really
owe you one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't be modest! The only reason I didn't jump
out of the basket is 'cause I had you there to grab
onto!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And not just that... I'm also happy because I
realized how close our hearts are now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gasp! ...Does that mean if we go again, our hearts will grow even closer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure my heart could take another ride. I quickly talk her out of the idea, and we bring our hiking trip to a close.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Well, okay! I'm actually glad to hear that!
Let's find something less scary to do!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ah! A boat! Let's go on a boat ride! ♪ We can get
our hearts and our arms in sync rowing downriver!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And rooow! One, two! One, two! Give it more
oomph! OOONE, TWOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! My legs are soaked! I didn't reckon we'd
be goin' for a sw—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ain't you just the picture of chivalry! ♪Color me
impressed!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I was tryin' to impress you, but looks
like that went and backfired... Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is in high spirits as we hit the dusty
trail and bring our hiking trip to a close.
